title: The Hollow Synod
atAGlance: A subterranean cult-state pursuing spark amalgamation through abduction and sacrificial engineering.
sageNotes: The Hollow Synod is no rabble of cave raiders, but a disciplined cult-state devoted to harvest and forced union of divine sparks. Its cells move by ritual order, preparing ambushes and reinforcements long before a strike is seen. Surface folk fear the Synod not only for cruelty, but for patience.
gameInformation: Synod cells favor layered ambushes, narrow kill-zones, and attrition through exhaustion. Defeating ritual nodes before completion prevents major Harvest Clock jumps and denies enemy reinforcement waves.
